titleStmt.title: SII 17.569: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 569. (A.R. No. 525 of 1904.) TIRUNELLIKKĀVAL, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north and east walls of the central shrine in the Āmalakēśvara temple.

This inscription is dated in the 7th year of Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Vīrarājēndradēva. As this title Tribhuvanachakravartin is not found with the name of the Chōḷa kings earlier than Kulottuṅga I and as Kulōttuṅga III himself had the title of Vīrarājēndra, the king may be identified as Kulōttuṅga III.
This records the gift of 160 kāśu for a perpetual lamp to the god in the temple by Tirunaṭṭamāḍi Āṭkoṇḍanāyakaṉ alias Ediriliśōḻa Iḍaiyaḷanāṭṭu-kkōṉ, the head man of Kuṉṟalūr.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virarājendradevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāva maiyum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ Irājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalak kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṉṟalūr kiḻavan tirunaṭṭamāṭi Āṭkoṇṭa nāyakaṉāṉa Etirilicoḻa Iṭaiyaḷanāṭṭukkoṉ vaitta tiruṉuntāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupattaiñcukku Eṇṇai toṇṇūṟṟu Orunāḻi Uḻakkukku Ivar Upaiyamākat tanta kācu 100 6 10 Ikkācu nūṟṟaṟupatukkup policai cekuttu Ikkoyilār muppatuvaṭṭattukkāṇiyuṭaiya civabrāhmaṇaril bhāradvāji neti tirunaṭṭamāṭiyāṉa Atikaināyakapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭomum kavicikaṉ mātavan Uyyavantāṉāṉa Aḻakaviṭaṅkapaṭṭaṉum bhāradvāji kūttaṉ Īca(ṉa)ṉāṉa purovari paṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭomum Ikkuṭiyil civannelliyāṉa tevar kaṇṭapaṭṭaṉuḷḷuṭṭomum
Ikkuṭiyil kamalākaraṉ paḷḷikoṇṭāṉuḷḷiṭṭomum Āka Ivaṉaivom rum Eṅkaḷ vamśattārum Eṅkaḷ pakkal kāṇi peṟṟuṭai yārum Ippaṭi kaṭavomāka sammatittu Ikkācu nūṟṟaṟupatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu kal veṭṭivittom Ivaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji neti tirunaṭṭamāṭi Atikai nāyakapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .....ippaṭikku Ivai kavucikaṉ mātavaṉuyyavantāṉāṉa Aḻakaviṭaṅka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu:—itu bhāradvāji kūttaṉīcaṉāṉa puravari paṭṭaṉ taṉamaikku Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil māṭāpattiyañ ciṟṟāmūruṭaiyarn tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirunellikkāvuṭai yāṉāṉa Arivāḷattāyāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ikkuṭiyil civaṉ tevar kaṇṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu bhāradvāji paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ sajñātanamaikku Inṉāyaṉār tevatāṉattukkāṇiyum nimantakkāṇiyum viśvapirāṉtiyākanāna tillaināyakappiccan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyilil nimantakkāṇiyuṭaiya kūttāṭuvāṉ tiru
Digital edition of SII 17.569 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
